question: 'अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह' राज्य में 1991 की जनगणना वर्ष के दौरान उन स्थानों के लिए स्थान का नाम, स्थान का प्रकार और कुल घरेलू संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, जहाँ कुल घरेलू संख्या 100 से अधिक है, और परिणामों को कुल घरेलू संख्या के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में रैंक करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.LOCATION_TYPE, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.LOCATION_TYPE HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) > 100 ORDER BY SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name, dim_geography_hierarchy.location_type, fact_housing.number_of_households 
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy 
JOIN fact_housing ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_housing.hierarchy_id 
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
AND fact_housing.census_year = 1991 
AND fact_housing.number_of_households > 100 
ORDER BY fact_housing.number_of_households DESC;

SELECT 
    dgh.state, 
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) AS total_households, 
    AVG(fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) AS avg_residential_houses

    fact_housing fh
JOIN 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fh.hierarchy_id = dgh.hierarchy_id
WHERE 
    fh.census_year = 1991
GROUP BY 
    dgh.state
HAVING 
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) > 100

    avg_residential_houses DESC;
